title: Smoky Solo Dinner American Rest-Meat Bowl
description: A hearty, smoky bowl filled with tender rest-meat, fluffy rice, and sautéed vegetables, perfect for a solo dinner.

ingredients.name: Rest-meat (such as brisket or short ribs)
Rice
ingredients.notes: Short-grain rice, such as calrose or japonica

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the onion and cook, stirring occasionally, until caramelized and golden brown, about 8 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the rest-meat and cook, stirring occasionally, until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the smoked paprika, chili powder, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add 1 cup of water to the skillet and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 10 minutes, until the rest-meat is tender.
Meanwhile, cook the rice according to package instructions.
To assemble the bowls, place a scoop of cooked rice in the bottom of a dolsot-stone bowl, then top with the rest-meat mixture and garnish with cilantro.
